case_title: PAUL N BRYLEWSKI VS. HARRY CHRISTOPHER MARLOW

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO APR-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-14-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY BRYLEWSKI, PAUL N AS TO DEFENDANT MARLOW, HARRY CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRYLEWSKI, PAUL N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARLOW, HARRY CHRISTOPHER $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, PLAINTIFF APPEARS AND REPRESENTS THAT DEFENDANT DEFAULTED IN TERMS OF MEDIATION AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT HARRY CHRISTOPHER MARLOW NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
